articles.headline: Novartis CEO joins Anthropic board as pharma-AI ties deepen
articles.summary: Anthropic appointed Novartis CEO Vas Narasimhan to its board of directors, making him the first pharmaceutical executive on the AI startup's governing body. The appointment signals Anthropic's strategic focus on healthcare applications as it prepares for a potential IPO, with Narasimhan bringing expertise from overseeing development of over 35 medicines in highly regulated environments.
articles.why_it_matters: This represents the deepening convergence of AI and pharma at the highest strategic levels, with major implications for drug development acceleration and regulatory frameworks as AI companies prepare for public markets.
